packGapMatrix.keyword: plan a trip from calendar events

strategicGaps.gap: Own the AI travel planning category with direct comparison and proof pages.
evidence: AI trip planner: Pack 0.55, best competitor 1
best AI travel planner: Pack 0.55, best competitor 1
AI travel planner: Pack 0.85, best competitor 1
AI itinerary planner: Pack 0.55, best competitor 0.65
travel planning app with AI: Pack 0.55, best competitor 0.65
plan a trip from calendar events: Pack 0.55, best competitor 0.65
strategicGaps.action: Build a strong /ai-travel-planner or /guides/ai-travel-planning page with screenshots, workflow proof, FAQs, and comparison sections for Mindtrip, Layla, TripIt, Expedia, Booking, and Navan.

strategicGaps.gap: Trip organization and email-confirmation organization are under-owned by Pack relative to itinerary organizer competitors.
evidence: automatic trip itinerary: leaders Navan, TravelPerk
email itinerary organizer: leaders Mindtrip, TripIt, Wanderlog, KAYAK
travel itinerary organizer: leaders none detected
trip organizer app: leaders none detected
travel confirmation parser: leaders none detected
travel inbox organizer: leaders none detected
strategicGaps.action: Turn /travel-history and /upcoming-trip-details into stronger itinerary-organizer pages, then add a focused guide targeting travel itinerary organizer, trip organizer app, and email itinerary organizer.

strategicGaps.gap: Pack has no programmatic destination or city inventory moat like OTAs and consumer planners.
evidence: Layla: Programmatic travel inventory or destination landing pages.
Expedia: High-authority transactional marketplace footprint across flights, hotels, packages, and destinations.
Booking.com: High-authority transactional marketplace footprint across flights, hotels, packages, and destinations.
strategicGaps.action: Avoid shallow destination spam. Use Pack-owned utility data instead: TSA airport pages, live wait time explainers, public event planning examples, and benchmark pages.

strategicGaps.gap: Business-travel language is weak against Navan and TravelPerk.
evidence: Navan: Business-travel and expense-management authority content.
Booking.com: Business-travel and expense-management authority content.
TripIt: Business-travel and expense-management authority content.
Wanderlog: Business-travel and expense-management authority content.
TravelPerk: Business-travel and expense-management authority content.
strategicGaps.action: Add business-traveler and executive-assistant angles to existing capability pages before creating B2B landing pages.

strategicGaps.gap: GEO answer readiness should be expanded around comparison questions, not AI-only markup.
evidence: Trip organization: 7 high-gap terms
AI travel planning: 8 high-gap terms
Airport security intelligence: 4 high-gap terms
Traveler profile and loyalty: 4 high-gap terms
Booking with context: 6 high-gap terms
Travel-day operations: 1 high-gap terms
strategicGaps.action: Add visible answers for comparison, use-case, and how-it-works questions; keep structured data representative of visible content.
